suno.style_tags: psycho glitch techno, 132bpm, instrumental, glitch, heavy bass
suno.prompt_body:
[Intro]
[Atmosphere: moderate spatial depth, natural room reverb, warm acoustic spaces]
[Tempo: uptempo, fast-paced, high-speed energy]

[Verse 1]
[Rhythm: punishing blast beats, hyper-compressed industrial kicks, overwhelming rhythmic chaos, dense complex breakbeats]
[Bass: heavy driving bass, gritty saturated low-end]

[Motif Showcase]
[clear, prominent fragmenting cathedral organ motif]
[Harmony: layered, rich harmonies in a minor scale]

[Glitch Break]
[Texture: chaotic digital fragmentation, severe glitching, granular audio degradation, stutter spray]

[Outro]
[Structure: fragmented anti-drop structure, unexpected jump cuts, micro-breakdowns]
[End]

psycho_default.motif_block:
[Core Musical Identity:
cold cathedral organ motif,
minor-key obsessive 4-bar phrase,
gradually fragmented by glitch processing,
reintroduced after each structural breakdown or hard reset,
serves as the emotional anchor inside the industrial chaos]

arrangement_timeline.description: Ambient soundscape layers initialized. Drum pulse bypassed, slow atmospheric swell.
Melodic cells fade in. Base frequency lines introduced, establishing harmonic field.
Rhythmic density increased. Glitch elements activate, filters sweeps rising in cutoff.
Saturated peak performance. Maximum glitch triggers, drum impact maxed, motif fully modded.
Signal decay. Reverb tails decay to silence, rhythm elements mute, residual synth noise.
